request.prompt:
Verify exactly one K-pop event candidate using web search. Do not bundle another event.

Candidate ID: discovery-red-velvet-august-1-2026
Artist: Red Velvet
Claimed dates: August 1, 2026
Claimed venue: Korea University Hwajeong Tiger Dome (Hwajeong Gymnasium)
Claimed city/country: Seoul, South Korea
Raw candidate title: Red Velvet live event at Korea University Hwajeong Tiger Dome (Hwajeong Gymnasium) on August 1, 2026

Strict evidence rules (do not relax): exclude kpopofficial.com and all other event aggregators as evidence; accept only an official artist/company, promoter, venue, ticketing, or reliable media source; artist AND exact date(s) must match (timezone tolerance only ±1 day); venue/city must not conflict; a general tour announcement without this stop/date is not a match. Return UNCONFIRMED if no qualifying source is found and CONTRADICTED if reliable evidence conflicts.

Return only these compact fields, in this order. Cite factual claims with the web-search citation mechanism:
VERDICT: CONFIRMED | UNCONFIRMED | CONTRADICTED
ARTIST_MATCH: true | false
DATE_MATCH: true | false
VENUE_OR_CITY_MATCH: true | false
MATCHED_DATES: ...
SOURCE_QUALITY: official_artist_company | promoter | venue | ticketing | reliable_media | none
SOURCE_URLS: ...
REASON: one short factual sentence

input.query: Red Velvet concert August 2026 Korea University Hwajeong

content.title: Red Velvet sets August return, ending 2-year wait for full group comeback - The Korea Times

KSG Updates on X: "[INFO] 2026 RED VELVET FANCON A DAY IN RED & VELVET - Show Date: (1st) August 1, 2026 (Sat) 6:00PM(KST) (2nd) August 2, 2026 (Sun) 4:00PM(KST) - Venue: Korea University Hwajeong Tiger Dome - Ticket Price: General Seats KRW 143,000 (Including VAT) - Age Rating: 7 years old and https://t.co/Riab2hCboO" / X

Red Velvet reveals plans for 2026 fan convention "A Day In Red & Velvet" after announcing August comeback. - Pannchoa

citations.title: Girl group Red Velvet to return with new album, fan concert in August

content.text: Multiple reliable outlets confirm the fan concert takes place at the Tiger Dome gymnasium at Korea University in northern Seoul at 6 p.m. on Aug. 1
